meals.name: Poached Egg with Whole-Grain Sourdough, Avocado & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: Plate with one poached egg on toasted sourdough, sliced fresh avocado, handful of blueberries on the side, natural morning light, minimalist plating
day_of_steps: Bring a small pot of water to a gentle boil. Toast one slice of sourdough.
Create a gentle whirlpool in the water, slide the egg into the centre. Poach for 3–4 minutes.
Spread toasted sourdough with avocado. Slide poached egg on top.
Arrange blueberries on the side. Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Almonds & Apple
meals.image_prompt: Small handful of raw almonds and one whole fresh apple on a white plate, natural daylight
day_of_steps: Measure almonds into a small bowl.
Wash apple and place whole or sliced beside almonds.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Quinoa
meals.image_prompt: Bowl of fluffy quinoa topped with sliced grilled chicken breast, roasted courgette, bell pepper, cherry tomatoes, drizzle of olive oil, lemon wedge, fresh herbs, warm natural light
prep_steps: Rinse 200 g quinoa, cook in 400 ml salted water. Fluff and cool.
Dice courgette, bell pepper, red onion (finely, cooked), cherry tomatoes. Toss with 2 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper, dried oregano.
Roast vegetables at 200°C for 20 minutes until tender. Cool.
Season chicken breast with salt, pepper, dried oregano, lemon zest. Grill in a hot pan 6–7 min per side. Cool and slice.
Portion into containers: quinoa base + chicken + roasted veg.
day_of_steps: Remove lunch container from fridge.
Reheat gently in a microwave (2 min) or eat at room temperature.
Squeeze fresh lemon juice over the top.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Berries
meals.image_prompt: Bowl of thick Greek yogurt topped with crushed walnuts and fresh mixed raspberries and blueberries, natural light, simple white bowl
prep_steps: Portion Greek yogurt into containers (pre-measure).
Measure walnuts into small bags or containers.
day_of_steps: Remove yogurt container from fridge.
Top with measured walnuts and fresh berries.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Baked White Fish with Lemon, Green Beans & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: Fillet of white fish (cod or hake) baked with lemon slices on top, roasted green beans, cubed roasted sweet potato, drizzle of olive oil, fresh parsley, warm plate
prep_steps: Trim green beans, toss with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper. Roast at 200°C for 12 minutes.
Dice sweet potato, toss with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper. Roast at 200°C for 18 minutes.
Season fish fillet with salt, pepper, dried dill. Place on foil with thin lemon slices.
Bake fish at 200°C for 10 minutes. Cool slightly.
Portion into containers.
day_of_steps: Remove dinner container from fridge.
Reheat in a 180°C oven for 5 minutes, or microwave gently (2 min) until warm.
Garnish with fresh parsley and squeeze of lemon if available.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Smoked Salmon on Rye with Cream Cheese & Kiwi
meals.image_prompt: Two slices of dark rye bread topped with cream cheese and smoked salmon, two fresh kiwi fruits cut in half, natural morning light, bright green fruit
day_of_steps: Toast rye bread lightly.
Spread thin layer of cream cheese on each slice.
Lay smoked salmon slices on top.
Arrange fresh kiwi on the side, cut in half.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Cashews & Pear
meals.image_prompt: Handful of roasted unsalted cashews and one fresh pear on a small plate, natural daylight
day_of_steps: Measure cashews into a small bowl.
Wash pear and place whole on the plate.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Asian Chicken Stir-Fry with Bok Choy, Sesame & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: Bowl of fluffy brown rice topped with sliced chicken, fresh bok choy, sesame seeds, drizzle of sesame oil and soy sauce, ginger-garlic aroma visible, warm light
prep_steps: Cook 200 g brown rice in 400 ml water (45 min). Cool and portion.
Slice chicken breast into strips, season with salt, white pepper.
Wash and quarter bok choy, blanch 2 min, cool.
Toast 2 tbsp sesame seeds in a dry pan. Set aside.
Portion rice, chicken, bok choy, sesame seeds into containers.
day_of_steps: Remove container from fridge.
Heat 1 tsp sesame oil and 1 tbsp soy sauce in a small pan. Add chicken and bok choy, warm for 2 min.
Stir into rice, sprinkle sesame seeds.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Pistachios & Nectarine
meals.image_prompt: Small handful of shelled pistachios and one fresh nectarine on a white plate, natural afternoon light
day_of_steps: Measure pistachios into a small bowl.
Wash nectarine and place whole on the plate.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Pan-Seared Salmon with Roasted Asparagus & New Potatoes
meals.image_prompt: Pan-seared salmon fillet with crispy skin, roasted fresh asparagus, small waxy potatoes, lemon wedge, fresh dill, warm evening light on the plate
prep_steps: Boil 250 g new potatoes until tender (15 min). Cool and halve.
Trim asparagus, toss with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper. Roast at 200°C for 10 minutes.
Pat salmon fillets dry, season with salt, pepper, fresh dill.
Pan-sear skin-side down in a non-stick pan (4 min), flip and cook 3 min. Cool.
Portion into containers: salmon, asparagus, potatoes.
day_of_steps: Remove dinner container from fridge.
Reheat gently in a 180°C oven for 4 minutes, or microwave (2 min) until warm.
Drizzle with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Cheese & Raspberries
meals.image_prompt: Plate with one halved soft-boiled egg in a small egg cup, slice of toasted sourdough, 30g cheddar cheese, handful of fresh raspberries, natural morning light
prep_steps: Boil 7 eggs until soft (6 min from cold water). Cool in ice bath.
Slice and portion cheese (30 g per person).
day_of_steps: Toast one slice of sourdough.
Remove one soft-boiled egg from fridge, halve into an egg cup.
Arrange toasted bread, cheese, and fresh raspberries on the side.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Walnuts & Orange
meals.image_prompt: Handful of raw walnuts and one fresh peeled orange (or oranges segments) on a small plate, natural daylight
day_of_steps: Measure walnuts into a small bowl.

Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Mexican-Style Chicken Lettuce Wraps with Black Beans & Lime
meals.image_prompt: Large butterhead lettuce leaves filled with shredded chicken, black beans, diced red bell pepper, served with lime wedges on the side, fresh cilantro, warm natural light
prep_steps: Cook 200 g dried black beans (or use canned, drained). Season with cumin, chilli powder.
Shred or dice grilled chicken breast. Mix with lime juice, cumin, chilli powder.
Dice red bell pepper (fresh).
Separate and rinse butterhead lettuce leaves.
Portion into containers: beans, chicken, pepper, lettuce leaves.
day_of_steps: Remove container from fridge.
Lay out 2–3 lettuce leaves on a plate.
Fill each with 1 tbsp black beans, chicken, diced pepper.
Squeeze fresh lime over wraps.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Almonds & Peach
meals.image_prompt: Small handful of raw almonds and one fresh peach cut in half on a white plate, natural afternoon light
day_of_steps: Measure almonds into a small bowl.
Wash and halve fresh peach, remove stone.
Serve with 500 ml water.

meals.name: Turkey Meatballs with Tomato Sauce, Courgette & Pasta
meals.image_prompt: Plate of whole-wheat pasta topped with three turkey meatballs in rich tomato sauce, sautéed diced courgette, fresh basil, parmesan shaving, warm evening light
prep_steps: Mix 400 g ground turkey with 2 tbsp breadcrumbs, 1 egg, salt, pepper, dried oregano. Form 12 meatballs.
Bake at 200°C for 12 min. Cool.
Simmer meatballs in 300 ml passata (tomato sauce) for 5 min. Cool.
Dice courgette, sauté briefly in 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper. Cool.
Cook 150 g whole-wheat pasta, portion into containers.
Portion pasta + meatballs + sauce + courgette into containers.
day_of_steps: Remove dinner container from fridge.
Heat gently in a microwave (2 min) or small pan (3 min) until warm.
Top with fresh basil and light parmesan if available.
Serve with 500 ml water.

Dice courgette and halve cherry tomatoes (250 g total). Roast with 1 tbsp olive oil at 200°C for 15 min. Cool.
Prepare 100 g hummus (or use shop-bought).
Portion into containers: couscous + chicken + roasted veg, separate hummus.

Serve: rice base + tuna + cucumber salad. Sprinkle sesame seeds.

Simmer chickpeas + veg in 400 ml vegetable broth with cumin, cinnamon, paprika for 15 min.
Add 50 g chopped dried apricots. Simmer 5 min more. Cool.
Cook 150 g whole-wheat couscous in 300 ml broth. Cool.
Portion: couscous + tagine mixture into containers.

meals.image_prompt: Colourful salad of green lentils, roasted beetroot wedges, fresh rocket leaves, crumbled goat cheese, red onion (very finely sliced, not raw), drizzle of balsamic vinegar, olive oil

Roast diced beetroot (200 g) with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper at 200°C for 20 min. Cool.
Wash rocket (fresh, raw).
Finely dice red onion (40 g) and sauté very briefly in 1 tsp olive oil just to soften edges, cool.
Crumble 60 g goat cheese.
Portion into containers: lentils + roasted beetroot, separate rocket, onion, goat cheese.

Drizzle with 1 tbsp balsamic vinegar and 1 tsp olive oil.
Serve with 500 ml water.
